summary: Single Team subscriber ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball archive non-subscribed teams - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user is a single team subscriber
AND an ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game doesn't include the subscribed-to-team
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3

steps.action:
WHEN a user is not subscribed to either team
AND a user views/focuses an archive ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon does not display in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is no dark overlay of the team match up
